summary: Profile of natural horsemanship expert Pat Parelli and an embedded video explaining why he uses Cavallo hoof boots instead of metal horseshoes, with a nod to the book There are No Horseshoes in Heaven.
Minimal page hosting a YouTube video of Pat Parelli talking about Cavallo hoof boots, with almost no surrounding text.
Overview of Cavallo Total Comfort System saddle pads and the Tri-Density Solution, listing horse benefits, construction features, and shock-absorption technology.
Single embedded YouTube video showing places riders can go with Cavallo hoof boots, with no body text.
Explains the Cavallo Best Boot 180-day warranty terms, what is and isn't covered, retailer purchase requirements, plus shipping information.
Instructions for arranging a size exchange or return of Cavallo hoof boots, including the return-authorization checklist, as-new condition requirements, and North American return handling.
Sign-up page for the Cavallo Horse and Rider newsletter offering special deals, newsletters and community support.
Cavallo Horse & Rider website terms and conditions covering third-party links, linking/framing permissions, and usage rules.
Post-signup thank-you confirmation welcoming new subscribers to the Cavallo community and noting the Barefoot Trim Manual will arrive by email.
In-depth evidence page on why Cavallo boots are effective, centered on a Western Kentucky University study comparing Trek hoof boots to metal shoes for protection, traction and reduced hoof pressure.
Promotional page for Carole Herder's book There are No Horseshoes in Heaven, describing its message on natural horse care with endorsements from Monty Roberts and Pat Parelli.
Form for customers to request an exchange, return or warranty claim and receive a Return Authorization Number, noting boots must be in as-new condition.
